{{Quote|Offworlders claimed there were few people, few things, truly born on the shadowy face of Socorro. To gaze upon the bizarre character of Abdi-Badawzi was to believe that no other planet was capable of producing such a rare sun.|Abdi-Badawzi|<ref name="OOTC">{{JournalCite|2|Out of the Cradle}}</ref>}}
'''Abdi-Badawzi''' was a [[Color/Legends|black]]-skinned [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] boss based on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. His base of operation was hidden in the [[Rym Mountains]]. He dealt primarily in arms and drug [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]], and was one of the three founding members of the [[Ethra Brewery]].

==Biography==
[[File:Abdi-Badawzi.jpg|thumb|left|Abdi-Badawzi with Tra'Parr'Sratt and Secles Uslopos]]
Abdi-Badawzi sported the impression of a kindly [[Monarchy/Legends|monarch]] who ruled his subjects with an iron grip. This meant that he doted on his lackeys and rewarded them when they accomplished their missions, but he [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] and [[Death/Legends|murdered]] them if they failed him.

He employed a range of talented [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and presided over a small [[Army/Legends|army]] of highly trained henchmen and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. Among his more notable employees were [[Kaine Paulsen]], [[Elias Halbert]], [[Tra'Parr'Sratt]], [[Durmag]], and [[Secles Uslopos]].

He had a daughter named [[Memcha-Badawzi]], who ran the [[Cordel Cove|spaceport]] on [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]].
